name: dumbbell incline hammer press on exercise ball
instructions: Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other.
Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other. Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides. Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other. Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement. Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

conditionNotes.note: Keep load symmetrical and stop at positions that create sharp pain or twisting.
Use pain-free range of motion, slower tempo, and lighter progressions when joints feel irritated.
Weight-bearing resistance exercises are beneficial for bone density when load is appropriate.
Maintain neutral spine and avoid positions that aggravate the lower back.
Maintain consistent breathing throughout. Avoid breath-holding.
Both aerobic and resistance training improve insulin sensitivity. Monitor blood sugar before, during, and after sessions. Have a fast-acting carb available.
Rhythm-based exercises and large-amplitude movements are beneficial. Focus on motor confidence.
Focus on muscle co-contraction and joint stability. Avoid locking out joints passively.
Functional patterns are generally safe. Prioritize pelvic floor awareness and avoid Valsalva.
Start light with higher reps and shorter ROM. Progress load gradually as pain-free capacity increases.
